contact.name: Kanna Ajay Kumar
contact.title: UI/UX Designer & Consultant
contact.tagline: Creating intuitive, accessible experiences that drive business outcomes. Specialized in enterprise UX, AI integration, and design systems.

about.background: Mechatronics Engineer turned UX Designer, bringing systematic problem-solving and technical depth to user-centered design.
about.specialization: Enterprise UX, AI-driven interfaces, design systems, and low-code platforms (Pega, Outsystems).
about.approach: Research-driven design, rapid prototyping, accessibility-first thinking, measured by tangible business impact.

projects.title: ADAM Control Tower – AI Agent Monitoring & Governance Platform
projects.summary: Designed an enterprise-level AI governance and monitoring dashboard that provides unified visibility across all AI agents within an organization.
projects.impact: Faster anomaly detection for AI Ops teams, Higher agent reliability through human evaluation workflows, Scalable design system supporting 50+ AI agents
projects.problemStatement: Streamlining a complex in-store ordering process.

projects.title: AD Circular – Responsive Recycling Website
projects.summary: Designed a fully responsive recycling website for Avery Dennison to promote paper circularity and increase transparency in their sustainability initiatives. The goal was to provide an intuitive platform for industries to schedule pickups, estimate recycling impact, and access multilingual educational content on circularity
projects.impact: Increased user engagement, Delivered a scalable, multilingual design system improving consistency

projects.title: Holistic Health & Wellness Mobile App
projects.summary: Designed a mobile-first wellness app that helps working professionals improve their lifestyle through personalized coaching, AI-driven assistance, and integrated health tracking. The app unifies food journaling, workout tracking, hydration, sleep, and habit building into one cohesive platform while providing real-time human and AI support
projects.impact: 60% goal completion rate among pilot users, 50% increase in new users during MVP testing, AI assistant "TARA" used by 80% of users for food logging,
projects.problemStatement: Connecting businesses for a circular economy.

projects.title: Immersive Retail Store POC – VR Application for the Metaverse
projects.summary: Designed a virtual retail store proof-of-concept using Unity to explore next-generation shopping experiences for the metaverse. UX methodologies—including personas, flows, affinity mapping, prioritization, and heuristic evaluation—were used to shape a prototype that could influence future enterprise VR retail initiatives.
projects.impact: Presented to TCS unit head; received strong positive feedback, Built foundation for future user testing with target customer groups
projects.problemStatement: Boosting user motivation in health tracking.

projects.title: John Coffee Beans – Mobile App UI Design
projects.company: Personal Project (Based on Random Project Generator)
projects.summary: Designed a personalized coffee beans shopping mobile app targeted at 52-year-old business professionals who value convenience, premium quality, and quick decision-making
projects.impact: Identified key UX blockers through Maze usability tests, Increased clarity in onboarding and product discovery
projects.problemStatement: Ensuring AI compliance with intuitive design.

projects.title: Strategic Migration of Legacy Financial Applications to Pega Constellation
projects.summary:
Delivered a multi-phase strategic migration of seven legacy enterprise financial applications to the modern Pega Constellation framework. The focus is on improving system longevity, increasing maintainability, and enhancing user experience across multiple business-critical workflows.
As the only UX designer, responsibilities include discovery, requirement gathering, user flows, wireframing, high-fidelity UI, and collaborating with BAs and developers.
projects.impact: Streamlining 7 legacy applications into a unified, scalable Pega framework, Improving UX consistency across critical financial workflows, Enabling faster development with reusable components, flows, and templates

projects.title: AI Governance Application – Enterprise Compliance & Reporting (Pega Constellation)
projects.summary:
Designed a conceptual enterprise application that allows organizations to audit, govern, and monitor their internal AI applications in alignment with Australian AI Governance, Privacy, and Compliance laws.
The mockup focuses on simplifying compliance workflows, surfacing risks early, and generating structured governance reports using Pega Constellation's modern UI patterns.

The project integrates responsible AI principles, transparency guidelines, and operational governance requirements into an intuitive user experience for risk teams, compliance leads, and IT governance managers.
projects.impact: Created a clear framework for AI governance aligned with Australian regulations, Standardized compliance checks across multiple AI systems, Enabled centralized visibility for risk, audit, and governance teams

testimonials.quote: Even though we had only a few days of interaction, it was truly great working with Ajay. He had been cooperative, approachable, and always ready to take on any challenge
testimonials.author: Yasaswini Desu

testimonials.quote: Working with Kanna was a pleasure. He delivered an excellent VBG wireframe on a very tight deadline without compromising quality
testimonials.author: Nikesh Mangwani

testimonials.quote: It was amazing to see all the screens Kanna built for CT. He understood the business requirements in depth and translated them into clear, structured designs in no time
testimonials.author: Ramya Prakash

testimonials.quote: Working with Kanna on the AD Circular project was an absolute pleasure. He quickly understood the business goals, user needs, and technical constraints, and translated everything into clean, user-friendly designs. His ability to simplify complex recycling flows into intuitive screens made a huge difference for our stakeholders. Truly dependable and detail-oriented
testimonials.author: Karabhi Baruah

testimonials.quote: Kanna is one of the most proactive designers I've mentored. He brings clarity, strong UX thinking, and a collaborative mindset to every project. Whether it was enterprise workflows, research, or design systems, he always delivered high-quality output on time. His growth in UX has been exceptional, and he brings both creativity and practicality to his work
testimonials.author: Purvi Gandhi

testimonials.quote: Ajay played a vital role in our CBA migration program. Despite being the sole UX designer, he efficiently handled multiple financial flows, coordinated with BAs, developers, and clients, and ensured a consistent Pega Constellation experience. His communication, ownership, and ability to adapt quickly make him a valuable asset on any delivery team
testimonials.author: Ashok Kumar Naga

testimonials.quote: Ajay kumar's work on the ADAM Control Tower POC exceeded our expectations. He brought structure to an extremely complex AI governance problem and designed a dashboard that both technical and business teams could easily understand. His attention to detail, self-initiative, and strategic thinking stood out throughout the project
testimonials.author: Senthil Peramanathan

testimonials.quote: Ajay has been instrumental in shaping the UX of our Flexcellence app. He deeply understood our users' health challenges and transformed them into clean, empathetic, and functional designs. He is highly iterative, listens well, and delivers fast. His work directly contributed to improvements in engagement and conversion during our testing phase
testimonials.author: Anurag

testimonials.quote: Ajay's design approach perfectly aligned with our brand vision. He created a modern and accessible design system, helped refine user journeys, and collaborated closely with marketing to ensure consistency across the app. His ability to visualize ideas clearly and communicate them effectively made the entire process smoother
testimonials.author: Mahitha

welcomeVideo.title: How a Website Transforms Your Local Business

successStories.title: The Green Leaf Cafe
successStories.description: They had amazing coffee but no online menu or way to find them.
successStories.before: Relied only on foot traffic. Slow weekdays.
successStories.after: A mobile-friendly site with an online menu and table reservation system.
successStories.result: 30% increase in weekly orders and fully booked weekends within 2 months.
